feature vrt2 { # Vertical Alternates and Rotation
    sub space by space.rotat;
    sub exclam by exclam.rotat;
    sub quotedbl by quotedbl.rotat;
    sub numbersign by numbersign.rotat;
    sub dollar by dollar.rotat;
    sub percent by percent.rotat;
    sub ampersand by ampersand.rotat;
    sub quotesingle by quotesingle.rotat;
    sub parenleft by parenleft.rotat;
    sub parenright by parenright.rotat;
    sub asterisk by asterisk.rotat;
    sub plus by plus.rotat;
    sub comma by comma.rotat;
    sub period by period.rotat;
    sub slash by slash.rotat;
    sub zero by zero.rotat;
    sub one by one.rotat;
    sub two by two.rotat;
    sub three by three.rotat;
    sub four by four.rotat;
    sub five by five.rotat;
    sub six by six.rotat;
    sub seven by seven.rotat;
    sub eight by eight.rotat;
    sub nine by nine.rotat;
    sub colon by colon.rotat;
    sub semicolon by semicolon.rotat;
    sub less by less.rotat;
    sub equal by equal.rotat;
    sub greater by greater.rotat;
    sub question by question.rotat;
    sub at by at.rotat;
    sub A by A.rotat;
    sub B by B.rotat;
    sub C by C.rotat;

    sub T by T.rotat;
    sub U by U.rotat;
    sub V by V.rotat;

    sub X by X.rotat;
    sub Y by Y.rotat;
    sub Z by Z.rotat;
    sub bracketleft by bracketleft.rotat;
    sub yen by yen.rotat;
    sub bracketright by bracketright.rotat;

    sub underscore by underscore.rotat;
    sub grave by grave.rotat;
    sub a by a.rotat;
    sub b by b.rotat;
    sub c by c.rotat;
    sub d by d.rotat;
    sub e by e.rotat;
    sub f by f.rotat;
    sub g by g.rotat;
    sub h by h.rotat;
    sub i by i.rotat;
    sub j by j.rotat;
    sub k by k.rotat;
    sub l by l.rotat;
    sub m by m.rotat;
    sub n by n.rotat;
    sub o by o.rotat;
    sub p by p.rotat;
    sub q by q.rotat;
    sub r by r.rotat;
    sub s by s.rotat;
    sub t by t.rotat;
    sub u by u.rotat;
    sub v by v.rotat;

    sub whiteleftpointingindex by whiteuppointingindex;

    sub whitedownpointingindex by whiteleftpointingindex;

    sub upwardsarrowleftwardsofdownwardsarrow by rightwardsarrowoverleftwardsarrow;

    sub backslash.half by backslash.half.rotat;
} vrt2;

feature zero { # Slashed Zero
    sub zero by zero.zero;
    sub zero.half by zero.zero.half;
    sub fullwidthzero by zero.zero.full;
} zero;

feature fwid { # Full Widths
    sub space by ideographicspace;
    sub exclam by fullwidthexclamationmark;
    sub quotedbl by fullwidthquotationmark;
    sub numbersign by fullwidthnumbersign;
    sub dollar by fullwidthdollarsign;
    sub percent by fullwidthpercentsign;
    sub ampersand by fullwidthampersand;
    sub quotesingle by fullwidthapostrophe;
    sub parenleft by fullwidthparenleft;
    sub parenright by fullwidthparenright;
    sub asterisk by fullwidthasterisk;
    sub plus by fullwidthplus;
    sub comma by fullwidthcomma;
    sub hyphenminus by hyphen;
    sub period by fullwidthfullstop;
    sub slash by fullwidthsolidus;
    sub zero by fullwidthzero;
    sub one by fullwidthone;
    sub two by fullwidthtwo;
    sub three by fullwidththree;
    sub four by fullwidthfour;
    sub five by fullwidthfive;
    sub six by fullwidthsix;
    sub seven by fullwidthseven;
    sub eight by fullwidtheight;
    sub nine by fullwidthnine;
    sub colon by fullwidthcolon;
    sub semicolon by fullwidthsemicolon;
    sub less by fullwidthlessthansign;
    sub equal by fullwidthequal;
    sub greater by fullwidthgreaterthansign;
    sub question by fullwidthquestionmark;
    sub at by fullwidthcommercialat;
    sub A by Afullwidth;
    sub B by Bfullwidth;
    sub C by Cfullwidth;
    sub D by Dfullwidth;
    sub E by Efullwidth;
    sub F by Ffullwidth;
    sub G by Gfullwidth;
    sub H by Hfullwidth;
    sub I by Ifullwidth;
    sub J by Jfullwidth;
    sub K by Kfullwidth;
    sub L by Lfullwidth;
    sub M by Mfullwidth;
    sub N by Nfullwidth;
    sub O by Ofullwidth;
    sub P by Pfullwidth;
    sub Q by Qfullwidth;
    sub R by Rfullwidth;
    sub S by Sfullwidth;
    sub T by Tfullwidth;
    sub U by Ufullwidth;
    sub V by Vfullwidth;
    sub W by Wfullwidth;
    sub X by Xfullwidth;
    sub Y by Yfullwidth;
    sub Z by Zfullwidth;
    sub bracketleft by fullwidthleftsquarebracket;
    sub yen by fullwidthyensign;
    sub bracketright by fullwidthrightsquarebracket;
    sub asciicircum by fullwidthcircumflexmod;
    sub underscore by fullwidthlowline;
    sub grave by fullwidthgravemod;
    sub a by afullwidth;
    sub b by bfullwidth;
    sub c by cfullwidth;
    sub d by dfullwidth;
    sub e by efullwidth;
    sub f by ffullwidth;
    sub g by gfullwidth;
    sub h by hfullwidth;
    sub i by ifullwidth;
    sub j by jfullwidth;
    sub k by kfullwidth;
    sub l by lfullwidth;
    sub m by mfullwidth;
    sub n by nfullwidth;
    sub o by ofullwidth;
    sub p by pfullwidth;
    sub q by qfullwidth;
    sub r by rfullwidth;
    sub s by sfullwidth;
    sub t by tfullwidth;
    sub u by ufullwidth;
    sub v by vfullwidth;
    sub w by wfullwidth;
    sub x by xfullwidth;
    sub y by yfullwidth;
    sub z by zfullwidth;
    sub braceleft by fullwidthleftcurlybracket;
    sub brokenbar by fullwidthbrokenbar;
    sub braceright by fullwidthrightcurlybracket;
    sub backslash by fullwidthreversesolidus;
    sub bar by fullwidthverticalline;
    sub cent by fullwidthcentsign;
    sub sterling by fullwidthpoundsign;
    sub fraction by fullwidthsolidus;
    sub section by section.full;
    sub quotedblleft by quotedblleft.full;
    sub guillemetleft by leftdoubleanglebracket;
    sub periodcentered by katakanamiddledot;
    sub paragraph by paragraph.full;
    sub bullet by katakanamiddledot;
    sub quotesinglbase by fullwidthcomma;
    sub quotedblbase by quotedblbase.full;
    sub quotedblright by quotedblright.full;
    sub guillemetright by rightdoubleanglebracket;
    sub circumflexmod by fullwidthcircumflexmod;
    sub macron by fullwidthmacronmod;
    sub dieresiscomb by dieresis.full;
    sub softhyphen by fullwidthhyphenminus;
    sub copyright by copyright.full;
    sub logicalnot by logicalnot.full.alt;
    sub registered by registered.full;
    sub degree by degree.full;
    sub plusminus by plusminus.full;
    sub mu by mu-grek;
    sub onequarter by onequarter.full;
    sub onehalf by onehalf.full;
    sub multiply by multiply.full;
    sub divide by divide.full;
    sub overlinecomb by fullwidthmacronmod;

    sub enspace by ideographicspace;

    sub hiraganazu-kana.half by hiraganazu-kana;
    sub hiraganaze-kana.half by hiraganaze-kana;
    sub hiraganazo-kana.half by hiraganazo-kana;
    sub hiraganada-kana.half by hiraganada-kana;
    sub hiraganadi-kana.half by hiraganadi-kana;
    sub hiraganadu-kana.half by hiraganadu-kana;
    sub hiraganade-kana.half by hiraganade-kana;
    sub hiraganado-kana.half by hiraganado-kana;
    sub hiraganaba-kana.half by hiraganaba-kana;
    sub hiraganapa-kana.half by hiraganapa-kana;
    sub hiraganabi-kana.half by hiraganabi-kana;
    sub hiraganapi-kana.half by hiraganapi-kana;
    sub hiraganabu-kana.half by hiraganabu-kana;
    sub hiraganapu-kana.half by hiraganapu-kana;
    sub hiraganabe-kana.half by hiraganabe-kana;
    sub hiraganape-kana.half by hiraganape-kana;
    sub hiraganabo-kana.half by hiraganabo-kana;
    sub hiraganapo-kana.half by hiraganapo-kana;
    sub cent.half by fullwidthcentsign;
    sub sterling.half by fullwidthpoundsign;
    sub blackuppointingtriangle.half by blackuppointingtriangle;
    sub zero.zero.half by zero.zero.full;
    sub logicalnot.half by logicalnot.full.alt;
    sub backslash.half by fullwidthreversesolidus;
} fwid;

feature hwid { # Half Widths
    sub space by enspace;
    sub exclam by exclam.half;
    sub numbersign by numbersign.half;
    sub dollar by dollar.half;
    sub percent by percent.half;
    sub ampersand by ampersand.half;
    sub parenleft by parenleft.half;
    sub parenright by parenright.half;
    sub asterisk by asterisk.half;
    sub plus by plus.half;
    sub comma by comma.half;
    sub period by period.half;
    sub slash by slash.half;
    sub zero by zero.half;
    sub one by one.half;
    sub two by two.half;
    sub three by three.half;
    sub four by four.half;
    sub five by five.half;
    sub six by six.half;
    sub seven by seven.half;
    sub eight by eight.half;
    sub nine by nine.half;
    sub colon by colon.half;
    sub semicolon by semicolon.half;
    sub less by less.half;
    sub equal by equal.half;
    sub greater by greater.half;
    sub question by question.half;
    sub at by at.half;
    sub A by A.half;
    sub B by B.half;
    sub C by C.half;
    sub D by D.half;
    sub E by E.half;
    sub F by F.half;
    sub G by G.half;
    sub H by H.half;
    sub I by I.half;
    sub J by J.half;
    sub K by K.half;
    sub L by L.half;
    sub M by M.half;
    sub N by N.half;
    sub O by O.half;
    sub P by P.half;
    sub Q by Q.half;
    sub R by R.half;

    sub boxdrawingsrightupheavyandleftdownlight by boxdrawingsrightupheavyandleftdownlight.half;
    sub boxdrawingsleftdownheavyandrightuplight by boxdrawingsleftdownheavyandrightuplight.half;
    sub boxdrawingsrightdownheavyandleftuplight by boxdrawingsrightdownheavyandleftuplight.half;
    sub boxdrawingsdownlightanduphorizontalheavy by boxdrawingsdownlightanduphorizontalheavy.half;
    sub boxdrawingsuplightanddownhorizontalheavy by boxdrawingsuplightanddownhorizontalheavy.half;
    sub boxdrawingsrightlightandleftverticalheavy by boxdrawingsrightlightandleftverticalheavy.half;
    sub boxdrawingsleftlightandrightverticalheavy by boxdrawingsleftlightandrightverticalheavy.half;
    sub boxdrawingsheavyverticalandhorizontal by boxdrawingsheavyverticalandhorizontal.half;
    sub reverseddoubleprimequotation by reverseddoubleprimequotation.half;
    sub lowdoubleprimequotation by lowdoubleprimequotation.half;
    sub fullwidthbrokenbar by halfwidthformslightvertical;
    sub logicalnot.full.alt by logicalnot.half;
    sub onehalf.full by one_fraction_two.nut.half;
    sub zero.zero.full by zero.zero.half;
} hwid;
